name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Regsvr32 Command Line Without DLL
notes:
This Building Block detects a regsvr.exe execution that doesn't contain a DLL in the command line.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth
SIGMA Title: Regsvr32 Command Line Without DLL
SIGMA Description: Detects a regsvr.exe execution that doesn't contain a DLL in the command line


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Regsvr32 Command Line Without DLL on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of regsvr32.exe
when the event matches Command (custom) is N/A

when the event matches ((LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.dll%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.ocx%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.cpl%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.ax%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.bav%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.ppl%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Regsvr32 Command Line Without DLL on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of regsvr32.exe
AND NOT when the event matches Command (custom) is N/A

AND NOT when the event matches ((LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.dll%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.ocx%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.cpl%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.ax%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.bav%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.ppl%')) AQL filter query
